commands.repair_reason: The branch has no narrow ClawSweeper-repairable defect, but exact-head required checks are failing outside the touched files, so a maintainer should rerun or handle those lanes before merge.; Cleared: The diff touches UI display normalization, gateway sender-context construction, tests, and changelog text only; no concrete security or supply-chain regression was found. commands.review_summary:
This PR strips reserved sender metadata from Control UI chat normalization and live stream rendering, suppresses metadata-only render items, omits operator UI sender identity fields in `chat.send`, and adds regression tests plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Current-main source shows raw active stream rendering, role-limited display metadata stripping, and operator client sender fields that can create the reserved sender metadata block.
commands.review_followup: The branch has no narrow ClawSweeper-repairable defect, but exact-head required checks are failing outside the touched files, so a maintainer should rerun or handle those lanes before merge.
